Operation 'updateStore' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable. Original summary 'Update a store' is too generic and doesn't indicate what aspects can be updated. Description lacks critical details about partial update support, what fields can be modified, authentication requirements, return value, and side effects on delivery operations. Enhanced version clarifies the operation's scope, input expectations, response format, and operational impact for better AI agent decision-making about when and how to use this endpoint.

data.current_description: Updates an existing store under a business.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing store's information and configuration under a business. Accepts partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Common updates include store name, address, phone number, and operational settings. Requires authentication and valid external_business_id and external_store_id path parameters. Returns the updated Store object with all current properties. Changes take effect immediately and may affect delivery operations associated with this store.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Update a store' is too generic and doesn't indicate what aspects can be updated. Description lacks critical details about partial update support, what fields can be modified, authentication requirements, return value, and side effects on delivery operations. Enhanced version clarifies the operation's scope, input expectations, response format, and operational impact for better AI agent decision-making about when and how to use this endpoint.

message: Operation 'listDeliveries' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is too vague about available filters and return format. Added specificity about pagination, example filter types (status, date range, store), and clarified return value structure. This helps AI agents understand what filtering options are available and what data they'll receive, improving usability for delivery monitoring and history retrieval scenarios.

data.current_description: Retrieves a list of deliveries. Results can be filtered by various query parameters.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of deliveries with optional filtering. Supports filtering by delivery status, date range, store, and other criteria via query parameters. Returns a list of delivery objects with their current status and details. Use this to retrieve delivery history or monitor active deliveries.
data.reasoning: Description is too vague about available filters and return format. Added specificity about pagination, example filter types (status, date range, store), and clarified return value structure. This helps AI agents understand what filtering options are available and what data they'll receive, improving usability for delivery monitoring and history retrieval scenarios.

message: Operation 'updateDelivery' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description mentions status-dependent restrictions but lacks specificity about which fields can be updated at each stage. Added concrete examples of updatable fields at different delivery stages and clarified return value. This helps AI agents understand the constraints and determine if an update operation is feasible at a given delivery status.

data.current_description: Updates an existing delivery. Only certain fields can be updated depending on the current delivery status. For example, you can update tip amount or dropoff details before the Dasher picks up.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing delivery with status-dependent field restrictions. Updatable fields vary by delivery status: before pickup you can modify tip amount, dropoff address, and delivery instructions; after pickup, only tip amount can be updated. Returns the updated delivery object. Refer to UpdateDeliveryRequest schema for complete list of updatable fields by status.
data.reasoning: Original description mentions status-dependent restrictions but lacks specificity about which fields can be updated at each stage. Added concrete examples of updatable fields at different delivery stages and clarified return value. This helps AI agents understand the constraints and determine if an update operation is feasible at a given delivery status.

message: Operation 'acceptQuote' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks clarity about required inputs (quote_id parameter plus AcceptQuoteRequest body) and return value. Added specificity about what AcceptQuoteRequest contains, clarified that a delivery object is returned, and noted that quote expiration varies. This helps AI agents understand the complete workflow: create quote → check expiration → accept quote with delivery details → receive delivery object.

data.current_description: Accepts a previously created delivery quote, which creates a delivery at the quoted price. The quote must not be expired.
data.description_suggestion: Accepts a previously created delivery quote and creates a delivery at the quoted price. Requires a valid, non-expired quote_id and additional delivery details via AcceptQuoteRequest. Returns the newly created delivery object with assigned Dasher and delivery status. Quote expiration times vary; check quote response for validity window.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about required inputs (quote_id parameter plus AcceptQuoteRequest body) and return value. Added specificity about what AcceptQuoteRequest contains, clarified that a delivery object is returned, and noted that quote expiration varies. This helps AI agents understand the complete workflow: create quote → check expiration → accept quote with delivery details → receive delivery object.

message: Operation 'listBusinesses' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate. Description lacks details about pagination support, what fields are returned, and how to use parameters. Added information about pagination and return structure to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieves a list of businesses associated with your developer account.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all businesses associated with your developer account. Returns a list of business objects with their details including external_business_id, name, and other configuration information. Use pagination parameters to control result size and offset.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description lacks details about pagination support, what fields are returned, and how to use parameters. Added information about pagination and return structure to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'updateBusiness' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate. Description is too vague and lacks critical details about partial update support, which fields can be updated, what is returned, and side effects. data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing business entity identified by external_business_id. Supports partial updates - only provided fields in the request will be modified. Commonly updated fields include business name and contact information. Returns the updated business object with all current details. Changes are immediately reflected in the system.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description is too vague and lacks critical details about partial update support, which fields can be updated, what is returned, and side effects. Enhanced description clarifies update behavior and return value for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieves a list of stores under a business.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all stores under a specified business identified by external_business_id.
